query:
SELECT c.name as customerName, c.externalId as customerId,
  COUNT(*) as serviceCount,
  SUM(s.monthlyCost) as totalCost
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND s.monthlyRevenue = 0
  AND (s.status IS NULL OR s.status = 'active')
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND s.customerExternalId != ''
GROUP BY c.externalId, c.name
ORDER BY totalCost DESC
LIMIT 20;
